title: Zendesk vs Zoho
description: Compare Zendesk vs Zoho in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right crm & sales tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, Zendesk emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.3/5 rating compared to 4.2/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, Zendesk or Zoho?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, Zendesk edges ahead with a 4.3/5 rating. Zendesk excels at Leading support platform with ticketing, knowledge base, and AI bots, while Zoho is stronger for Comprehensive CRM with AI assistant, multichannel communication, and deep custom.

faqs.question: What are the main differences between Zendesk and Zoho?
faqs.answer: Zendesk and Zoho differ in pricing ($55–$115/agent/mo vs Free–$65/user/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is Zendesk cheaper than Zoho?
faqs.answer: Zendesk starts at $55–$115/agent/mo while Zoho starts at Free–$65/user/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, Zendesk or Zoho?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for crm & sales. Zendesk scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use Zendesk and Zoho together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, Zendesk or Zoho?
faqs.answer: Both Zendesk and Zoho prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which crm & sales tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Zoho for large teams, while Zendesk may be more suitable for smaller teams with its $55–$115/agent/mo pricing.
